heroHeadline: Iranian Missile Hits Chemical Plant in Negev; IDF Kills 6 at Khan Younis Checkpoints; Triple-Front Attack Continues on Day 30 of Iran War
heroSubtitle: Iranian ballistic missile strikes Ne'ot Hovav chemical zone near Beersheba; IDF airstrikes kill 6 including child at Khan Younis police checkpoints; Latin Patriarch barred from Palm Sunday Mass at Church of Holy Sepulchre as Axis of Resistance multi-front assault intensifies
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
